products.name: Green 1.0 Top
products.description: Leve e respirável — o Top Green 1.0 combina conforto com materiais sustentáveis.
products.description_en: Light and breathable — the Green 1.0 Top combines comfort with sustainable materials.

products.name: Green 1.0 T-shirt
products.description: Conforto inteligente com acabamento antibacteriano — a T-shirt Green 1.0 foi pensada para performance e sustentabilidade.
products.description_en: Smart comfort with antibacterial finish — the Green 1.0 T-shirt was designed for performance and sustainability.

products.name: Green 1.0 Legging
products.description: Compressão leve e suporte para treino — confeccionada com materiais reciclados.
products.description_en: Light compression and training support — crafted with recycled materials.

products.name: Green 1.0 Shorts
products.description: Shorts leves e de secagem rápida, com tecido reciclado de alta respirabilidade.
products.description_en: Lightweight, quick-dry shorts made from highly breathable recycled fabric.

products.name: Green 1.0 Hoodie
products.description: Camisola com capuz em tecido macio — ideal para aquecimentos e pós-treino.
products.description_en: Soft-fabric hoodie — ideal for warm-ups and post-workout.
